{% extends "base.html" %} {% block content %}

Accounting and Economics Principles Portal

Learn core accounting concepts, explore economic principles, and use business calculators in a Flask-powered website.

Accounting Fundamentals

Browse definitions, view ledger practice, and manage journal entries using a sample balance tracking tool.

Economics Concepts

Explore supply and demand, opportunity cost, elasticity, and equilibrium with clear examples.

Business Calculators

Calculate profit margin, break-even units, and current ratio with built-in forms.

How to use this site

  • Go to Accounting to study accounting principles and examples.
  • Visit Economics for market theory and decision-making guidance.
  • Use Calculator to compute financial ratios and break-even points.
  • Maintain a simple ledger in the Ledger section.
{% endblock %}
